title: JFrog Artifactory Firm-Wide Outage — Storage Volume Exhausted
rca: Artifactory primary storage volume reached 100% capacity at 07:58 UTC. Root cause: automated log rotation job (cron: logrotate.d/artifactory) failed silently on 2026-05-15 due to a stale lock file, allowing binary cache and build logs to fill the 2TB volume. Disk usage alerts were set at 95% — volume filled the final 2% within 10 minutes.
resolution_steps: 1. Emergency volume resize initiated at 08:15 UTC — 2TB → 4TB on primary node
4. Post-recovery: clear stale lock file, re-enable logrotate, add 80% disk alert
business_impact: All CI/CD pipelines firm-wide unable to pull or push artifacts. 3 release trains blocked including Payments scheduled release at 08:30 UTC. Approximately 47 engineers idle across 8 squads.
workaround: None viable. DR mirror stale — missing critical hotfix artifacts from 07:50 UTC.

communication_log.note: Bridge call opened with JFrog infra team
